title: South Seas Adventure
director: Carl Dudley, Richard Goldstone, Francis D. Lyon
writer: Charles Kaufman, Joe Ansen, Harold Medford
actors: Diane Beardmore, Marlene Lizzio, Tommy Zahn
plot: The fifth in a series of Cinerama travelogues---and not a Documentary since the vast majority of the film, aside from the scenery, is comprised of fictional stories. The first one involves an American girl, on a cruise to Hawaii, ...
